_comment: Copy to launch-branches.config.json and fill with your REAL branches. code is unique + uppercased (e.g. JED-MAIN, RYD-NORTH). name_ar + name_en required. type: hq|main|branch|satellite (default branch). status: active|inactive|maintenance|opening_soon (default active). location optional. Run --dry-run first; then provision staff with the new branchCode values.
